languages.text: "Запрашиваю аудиенцию Вольного Торговца. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус свершил богохульство пятой категории, нарушив заповеди катехизиса эксплуатации и обслуживания. Нарушитель аргументированно упорствует в отрицании искажения замысла Омниссии и настаивает на разрешении конфликта с привлечением третьей стороны".

traits.locale_text: "Почтенный {g|Encyclopedia:Magos}магос{/g} Ханейманн и глубокоуважаемый манипулус Ферренц ведут очень напряженный диалог на медицинской палубе. Это продолжается уже несколько часов, и ожесточенность споров лишь возрастает. Боюсь, без вашего вмешательства ситуация вряд ли разрешится".

languages.text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."
languages.original_text: "Запрашиваю аудиенцию Вольного Торговца. Генетор экстремис Эоганн Фебрус свершил богохульство пятой категории, нарушив заповеди катехизиса эксплуатации и обслуживания. Нарушитель аргументированно упорствует в отрицании искажения замысла Омниссии и настаивает на разрешении конфликта с привлечением третьей стороны".

traits.locale_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a fifth category blasphemy, violating the precepts of the catechism of operation and maintenance. The offender persists in his argumentative denial of distorting the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

The offender persists in his argumentative denial of distorting the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

"I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

languages.text: «Comerciante Independiente, solicito una audiencia. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs ha cometido una blasfemia de categoría cinco al infringir los preceptos del catequismo de operación y mantenimiento. El culpable insiste en negar su distorsión del diseño del Omnissiah y resolver el conflicto a través de la mediación de terceros».
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: «Comerciante Independiente, solicito una audiencia. El genetor extremis Eogunn Februs ha cometido una blasfemia de categoría cinco al infringir los preceptos del catequismo de operación y mantenimiento. El culpable insiste en negar su distorsión del diseño del Omnissiah y resolver el conflicto a través de la mediación de terceros».

languages.text: « Je demande une audience {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs s'est rendu coupable d'un blasphème de catégorie cinq en enfreignant les préceptes du Catéchisme des Opérations et de la Maintenance. Le contrevenant continue de nier avoir dénaturé l'œuvre de l'Omnimessie et insiste pour que le conflit soit réglé par la médiation d'une tierce partie. »
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: « Je demande une audience {mf|au libre-marchand|à la libre-marchande}. Le genetor extremis Eogunn Februs s'est rendu coupable d'un blasphème de catégorie cinq en enfreignant les préceptes du Catéchisme des Opérations et de la Maintenance. Le contrevenant continue de nier avoir dénaturé l'œuvre de l'Omnimessie et insiste pour que le conflit soit réglé par la médiation d'une tierce partie. »

languages.text: “我请求面见行商浪人。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯违反《操作与维护原理》，犯下五级亵渎罪。犯人拒不承认扭曲欧姆尼赛亚设计的罪行，并坚持由第三方调解冲突。”
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: “我请求面见行商浪人。特级基因士伊奥贡·费布鲁斯违反《操作与维护原理》，犯下五级亵渎罪。犯人拒不承认扭曲欧姆尼赛亚设计的罪行，并坚持由第三方调解冲突。”

languages.text: "Ich bitte um eine Audienz mit {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin}. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs hat eine Blasphemie des fünften Grades begangen, indem er die Gebote des Katechismus von Betrieb und Wartung verletzte. Der Beschuldigte bestreitet jede Abweichung vom Plan des Omnissiah und beharrt darauf, den Konflikt mit einem unabhängigen Schlichter beizulegen."
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: Ich bitte um eine Audienz mit {mf|dem Freihändler|der Freihändlerin}. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs hat eine Blasphemie des fünften Grades begangen, indem er die Gebote des Katechismus von Betrieb und Wartung verletzte. Der Beschuldigte bestreitet jede Abweichung vom Plan des Omnissiah und beharrt darauf, den Konflikt mit einem unabhängigen Schlichter beizulegen.

languages.text: "Hür Tacir ile görüşme talep ediyorum. Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs, Bakım ve Faaliyet İlmihâli'nin kurallarını ihlal ederek Beşinci Kategori dine aykırılık gerçekleştirmiştir. Suçlu, Hermesih'in tasarımını çarpıttığını reddetmekte ısrar ediyor ve anlaşmazlığı üçüncü bir tarafın ara buluculuğuyla çözmekte diretiyor."
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir ile görüşme talep ediyorum. Genetör Extremis Eogunn Februs, Bakım ve Faaliyet İlmihâli'nin kurallarını ihlal ederek Beşinci Kategori dine aykırılık gerçekleştirmiştir. Suçlu, Hermesih'in tasarımını çarpıttığını reddetmekte ısrar ediyor ve anlaşmazlığı üçüncü bir tarafın ara buluculuğuyla çözmekte diretiyor."

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダーとの謁見を要請します。ゲネター・エクストレミス・エオガン・フェブラスは、整備・運用教理問答の戒律に違反し、第五級冒涜を犯しました。当該違反者は、オムニッシアの設計を歪めたことを否認し続け、第三者の仲裁による紛争解決を主張しています」
languages.original_text: "I request an audience with the Rogue Trader. Genetor Extremis Eogunn Februs has committed a Category Five blasphemy by violating the precepts of the Catechism of Maintenance and Operation. The offender persists in denying his distortion of the Omnissiah's design and insists on resolving the conflict with third-party mediation."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダーとの謁見を要請します。ゲネター・エクストレミス・エオガン・フェブラスは、整備・運用教理問答の戒律に違反し、第五級冒涜を犯しました。当該違反者は、オムニッシアの設計を歪めたことを否認し続け、第三者の仲裁による紛争解決を主張しています」
